creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
The bug was already reported upstream here:

https://bugs.llvm.org/show_bug.cgi?id=44919

which was a duplicate of:

https://bugs.llvm.org/show_bug.cgi?id=45468

and fixed in:

https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/30588a739584bb8ac41715d68656d22bd85198e7

I'll import the upstream fix.
